notes_why: Tile removal + haul is the bottleneck, not crew size; wet-set mud roof so no reuse, full teardown to deck
Single-story simple hip, no valleys work stoppage, standard felt/synthetic pace
Concrete tile at this pitch/complexity, 5-man crew, valleys add cut time
Single-layer shingle tear-off, straight gable, no hips/valleys to slow crew
2-story adds staging/ladder time vs 1-story; simple gable keeps it fast otherwise
